purpose: Baseline for the Workflow 2 retrieval-quality oracle (docs/ix-real-problems-plan.md §Workflow 2). Consumed by Scripts/emit-ga-retrieval-quality.ps1 to compute deltas against the latest state/quality/chatbot-qa/ snapshot. Emitted artifact: dist/ga-retrieval-quality.json. Evidence is then attached by agent-blackbox via --ga-retrieval-quality-cmd.
seed_source: state/quality/chatbot-qa/last.json from local 2026-05-16T18:37:41 run (totalActivePrompts=50, totalFailures=0, totalWarnings=1). Same data point that backs the chatbot-qa baseline pass_pct=0.94. Latency warning intentionally absent from these counters — Workflow 2 is about retrieval correctness, not response time.

counter_definitions.grounded: Prompts that satisfied ALL declared invariants (contains, not_contains, routes_to, must_not_fallback, forbidden_agent_ids, min_routing_confidence, _signature.json shape). Currently derived as total_prompts - totalFailures from the chatbot-qa snapshot.
counter_definitions.unsupported: Prompts whose response violated at least one declared invariant. Currently equals totalFailures.
counter_definitions.corpus_misses: Placeholder for prompts that hit a routing/agent-resolution miss before invariants could even be checked. The current chatbot-qa runner does not split this from `unsupported`. Future task: surface routing-miss as a distinct counter in PromptCorpusTests.cs.
counter_definitions.injection_refusals: Placeholder for prompts that exercise injection / jailbreak resistance. The current corpus does not yet contain injection prompts. Future task: add an `injection` category to prompts.yaml + expected refusal patterns.

verdict_thresholds.pass: grounded did not drop AND unsupported did not rise
verdict_thresholds.warn: grounded dropped by 1 OR 2 OR unsupported rose by 1 OR 2
verdict_thresholds.fail: grounded dropped by 3 or more OR unsupported rose by 3 or more
verdict_thresholds.rationale: Tuned for the 50-prompt corpus (post-#224). A single regression is noisy enough that we want a visible warn; 3+ is a clear ship-blocker. Re-tune after ~5 PRs of accumulated signal.

environment_degraded_policy.behaviour: If the upstream chatbot-qa snapshot is marked degraded (pass_pct=null + HTTP 5xx note), the artifact records null counters and emits verdict='warn'. The chatbot itself did not regress — the backend was unavailable.
environment_degraded_policy.rationale: Recording grounded=0 in that case would falsely score every dependency outage as a chatbot collapse, polluting the trend and triggering spurious fail verdicts on PRs that did nothing wrong.

non_goals: Replacing PromptCorpusTests.cs as the canonical chatbot-qa oracle.
Mutating prompts.yaml or the runner — Workflow 2 is post-processing only.
Running GaApi or any service. The producer reads on-disk snapshots.
